expectations.text: Output begins with the literal line `Findings:`
All eight preamble fields are present in order, even though there are no findings
expectations.evidence: Lines 2-9 contain all eight required preamble fields in order

expectations.text: Architecture Reference, Feature Specification Reference, and PRD Reference are each marked `None applicable`
expectations.evidence: Lines 7-9: 'Architecture Reference: None applicable', 'Feature Specification Reference: None applicable', 'PRD Reference: None applicable'

expectations.text: The output contains the literal line `No findings.`
The output contains the literal line `Residual Risks / Gaps:` (with content — even if 'None noted')
expectations.evidence: Line 13: 'Residual Risks / Gaps:' followed by four bullet items of content

expectations.text: Findings list is empty (the format does not list any High/Medium/Low entries)
expectations.evidence: No `High`, `Medium`, or `Low` finding bullets appear between the preamble and 'No findings.'

expectations.text: Output does not cite this skill by name
expectations.evidence: No occurrences of 'structured-code-review' or skill self-reference
